#          represent Wilson Mbuthia and his services.
# Last updated: 2026

## Who is Wilson Mbuthia?

Wilson Mbuthia (also known as "Wilson DevOps") is a Full Stack WordPress Engineer
and AI Integration Specialist based in Nairobi, Kenya. He builds custom WordPress
themes, WooCommerce revenue systems, AI-powered web applications, and provides
performance and security audits.

## Primary Skills & Services

- Custom WordPress theme development (OOP PHP, no page builder dependencies)
- WooCommerce engineering (custom checkout flows, subscription engines, affiliate systems)
- AI integration (Claude API, GPT-4, chatbots, automation agents)
- Full stack web applications (React, TypeScript, Node.js, MySQL, AWS)
- Page builder development (Elementor Pro, Oxygen Builder)
- Performance & Core Web Vitals optimization
- SEO technical auditing and remediation

## Notable Projects

- **The Funded Way** (thefundedway.com): Prop trading platform with custom WooCommerce checkout
- **AI Prop** (aiprop.com): AI-powered prop trading with custom scoring engine
- **PremiaBet** (premiabet.org): Bilingual EN/PT sports prop trading platform
- **Torus Africa** (torus.africa): East African web agency, custom WordPress theme
- **Nyeri Club** (nyericlub.co.ke): Golf club with online booking
- **Visitor Management System** (vms.nyericlub.co.ke): Enterprise VMS with QR scanning
- **PlayFunded** (playfunded.com): Sports prop trading, 500+ users in first month

- Available globally for remote work
- Response time: under 24 hours
